title: Golden Hall Opening
camera_movement: slow dolly-in from the aisle toward the stage, stable and elegant
music_rhythm_point: 0:00 - first soft D major arpeggio, the hall breathes before the melody begins
subtitle: The hall falls silent.

title: First Phrase Side Profile
camera_movement: slow side dolly from left to right, very controlled
music_rhythm_point: 0:05 - Canon ground bass settles into the rhythm; melody enters gently
subtitle: Canon in D begins with a quiet pulse.

title: Hands on Canon Pattern
camera_movement: subtle push-in with minimal lateral motion
music_rhythm_point: 0:11 - melody becomes recognizable; gentle right-hand movement over stable left hand
subtitle: The melody begins to flow.

title: Over the Shoulder Reflection
music_rhythm_point: 0:16 - Canon progression turns inward; visual reflection matches the repeating melody
subtitle: A phrase answers itself.

title: Three-Quarter Keyboard View
camera_movement: very slow descending crane movement, almost still
music_rhythm_point: 0:22 - right hand pattern rises; the visual emphasis is clean fingering
subtitle: Every note is measured and light.

title: Portrait of Concentration
camera_movement: slow push-in toward the pianist's side profile
music_rhythm_point: 0:27 - emotional lift in the melody; let the face carry the feeling
subtitle: The melody opens.

title: Low Dolly Along the Piano
camera_movement: slow low-angle dolly along the piano rim, no fast orbit
music_rhythm_point: 0:33 - harmonic swell; camera movement becomes more expansive
subtitle: Light moves across the piano.

title: Final Cadence and Soft Fade
camera_movement: slow pull-back with soft fade out
music_rhythm_point: 0:40 - final cadence; last chord and lingering resonance
subtitle: The final chord lingers.
